_comment: 0.7.25 — fourth and final quest in the Exeggcute onboarding chain. Triggers when the player places a `cobblemon:pasture` block (the Pasture Block they got from evolve_exeggutor). beat_gym_2 is re-parented to this quest so the carrot-farm setup visually gates gym 2 — RCT trainer fights themselves aren't actually blocked, but the advancement tree shows the Cobbleworkers introduction as a prerequisite step.

description.text: Place your Pasture Block to set up your first automated farm.
